title: taraxacum novoburgense
intro: Taraxacum novoburgense, also known as New Burgundy dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum novoburgense include reducing blood pressure, improving liver function, and supporting the digestive system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and capsules, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
